issues.description: Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn' not 'OnPlay'. Card explicitly states '[End of Your Turn]'.
Missing duration field. '[End of Your Turn]' text requires duration:'DuringYourTurn' to distinguish from permanent end-of-turn effect.

Action type should be 'Rest' but the target scope is incomplete. Should specify selecting up to 2 Big Mom Pirates characters with cost ≥3, then rest them. Current implementation only rests without proper selection logic.
Target missing 'count' field to limit selection to 'up to 2' characters.
GiveDon action should include 'rest:true' parameter since the effect states 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it'.
